channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tensions Escalate in Gulf After Attacks on UAE and Iranian Oil Facilities
item.description: A major flare-up has erupted in the Gulf region as Iran threatened retaliation following US airstrikes on its main oil hub at Kharg Island. On Saturday, a drone attack disrupted operations at key UAE ...

item.title: Confusion Erupts at Taraba PDP Congress After Two Chairmen Declared
item.description: For Taraba State PDP congress wey happen on Saturday, wahala burst as the congress committee announce two different people as consensus chairman. First, dem announce Victor Samuel Falack and the party...

item.title: Nick Daicos’ positioning in the second half affects Collingwood’s loss to Adelaide
item.description: In the recent AFL clash, Collingwood suffered a pivotal loss to Adelaide, largely due to the absence of Nick Daicos in the centre of play during a critical seven-minute window in the second half. Alth...

item.title: World Urges Stronger Measures to Conserve Forests and Natural Resources
item.description: As we dey approach International Day of Forests on March 21, environmental experts, governments and local community groups dem dey push for stronger action to protect forests and manage natural resour...

item.title: Cignal Super Spikers secure qualifying round berth with win over Capital1
item.description: The Cignal Super Spikers dominated the Capital1 Solar Spikers in a decisive match, securing their spot in the qualifying round of the PVL All-Filipino Conference. The match, which took place on March ...

item.title: Understanding Conversation and the Role of Prediction in Hearing Loss
item.description: Conversation may seem effortless, but it involves remarkable cognitive coordination. Humans typically respond within 200 milliseconds of a speaking turn ending, yet producing a word takes at least 600...

item.title: Kenyan football clubs protest over unpaid funds and warn of possible match boycotts
item.description: Several Kenyan football teams are up in arms over what they describe as persistent delays and shortfalls in payments from the Football Kenya Federation (FKF). They complain that money promised to them...

item.title: President Ruto Joins Kapsabet Boys High School Centenary in Alumni Uniform
item.description: On Thursday, 12th March 2026, President William Ruto made headlines when he attended the centenary celebrations of Kapsabet Boys High School dressed in the school's uniform. The event marked 100 years...

item.title: Salman Ali Agha reprimanded by ICC for on-field misconduct during Bangladesh ODI
item.description: In the second ODI between Pakistan and Bangladesh in Dhaka, Salman Ali Agha received an official reprimand from the International Cricket Council (ICC) for breaching Level 1 of the ICC Code of Conduct...

item.title: Telangana Faces Shortfall in Commercial LPG Supplies, Domestic Supply Remains Stable
item.description: Telangana is currently experiencing a significant shortage in commercial LPG supplies, meeting only about 20% of the usual demand. The Civil Supplies Minister, N. Uttam Kumar Reddy, highlighted that w...

item.title: How Selling a Ram Helped a Kenyan Man Travel Abroad and Achieve His Dreams
item.description: Peter Njenga, a Kenyan now living in Lancaster, Pennsylvania, shared how a bold decision changed the course of his life. Back in 2017, he faced a challenge: he wanted to get a passport to pursue oppor...

item.title: Canberra Raiders focus on discipline and leadership ahead of Bulldogs clash
item.description: The Canberra Raiders are under pressure to improve their discipline and reduce errors following a heavy 40-6 loss to the New Zealand Warriors. Raiders second-rower Hudson Young highlighted the team’s ...

item.title: DA Demands Clarity on Suspension and Accountability of Health Officials Facing Corruption Allegations
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) has welcomed the announcement by Health Minister Dr Aaron Motsoaledi that Health Director-General Dr Sandile Buthelezi, Deputy DG Dr Percy Mahlati, and Chief Financial Off...

item.title: Trump Calls for International Warships to Secure Strait of Hormuz Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: In a Truth Social post on Saturday, President Donald Trump expressed hope that multiple nations would send warships to the Strait of Hormuz to collaborate with the United States in keeping this vital ...

item.title: Understanding the Musqueam Rights Recognition Agreement and Its Implications
item.description: In February 2026, the federal government and the Musqueam Indian Band signed a set of agreements recognising Musqueam Aboriginal rights across much of Metro Vancouver. The central agreement, the šxʷq̓...

item.title: Motorcycle crash in Maguindanao kills one, injures two relatives
item.description: COTABATO CITY, Philippines — A tragic accident occurred in Datu Unsay, Maguindanao del Sur on Friday when a motorcycle carrying three men collided with a parked backhoe, resulting in the death of one ...

item.title: Potential Health Effects of Sleeping With a Fan On and Expert Advice
item.description: For many Nigerians, especially for those wey dey experience serious heat for night, sleeping with fan on na like lifesaver to cool the room make sleep come easy. But some people don dey hear warnings ...

item.title: Trump urges UK and allies to send naval support to Strait of Hormuz amid Iran tensions
item.description: US President Donald Trump has called on the United Kingdom, along with France, Japan, South Korea, and China, to deploy naval forces to the Strait of Hormuz to prevent Iran from effectively closing th...

item.title: East African Community Explores Economic Potential of Waste Management
item.description: Environmental experts, policymakers and private sector leaders from the eight member states of the East African Community (EAC) met in Arusha to discuss ways of turning waste into economic value. The ...

item.title: Motörhead's Longtime Guitarist Phil Campbell Passes Away at 64 Following Major Surgery
item.description: Phil Campbell, the Welsh guitarist renowned for his 31-year tenure with the heavy metal band Motörhead, has died at the age of 64. His family, through the band Phil Campbell and The Bastard Sons—which...
